jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Wrogn - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Wrogn! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Wrogn:
Wrogn is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wrogn!
